{{CargoRelic
|name=Tyr's Arm
|rank=AA
|affct=FTH
|birthday=12-26
|source=Expert Scrolls (0.95%), Fragment Crafting (3.8%), Lottery Machine (0.08%), Wishing (0.35%)
|description=On Dec 26, 50,000 BC, one of Tyr's arm was bitten off by a wolf.

On this day, Hymir's son, Tyr, pulled a prank on Fenrir the Wolf and tied it up. To gain everyone's trust, Tyr reached his arm into the wolf's mouth. Fenrir realized that it was a trap by the gods and then bit off Tyr's arm, turning him into a one-armed god. Therefore, Tyr made a silver arm for himself.
|fame=46
|art=44
|fth=66
|civ=40
|tech=32
|ss1=Per Organ Transplanted, Snail HP +40<br>Per Organ Transplanted, Snail ATK +4<br>Organs Transplanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ Transplanted, Snail HP +60<br>Per Organ Transplanted, Snail ATK +6<br>Organs Transplanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ Transplanted, Snail HP +80<br>Per Organ Transplanted, Snail ATK +8<br>Organs Transplanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ Transplanted, Snail HP +120<br>Per Organ Transplanted, Snail ATK +12<br>Organs Transplanted: 40/40
|ss5=Per Organ Transplanted, Snail HP +160<br>Per Organ Transplanted, Snail ATK +16<br>Organs Transplanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ Transplanted, Snail HP +160<br>Per Organ Transplanted, Snail ATK +16<br>Organs Transplanted: 40/40<br>Snail HP + 700 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Koryeo skill II.png|50px]] Place in Koryeon Museum: In Koryeo, FTH Checks -10
|skill2=[[File:Koryeo skill II.png|50px]] Place in Koryeon Museum: In Koryeo, Snail HP +300
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Organ Boost]]
[[Category:Koryeo Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Koryeo Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:FTH Boost]]
[[Category:Relic Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Research Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Relic Points]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Organs]]
[[Category:Chika Boost]]
